---
title: "ENCASE - EnhaNcing seCurity and privacy in the Social wEb: a user centered approach for the protection of minors"
date: "2019"
year: "2019"
funder: "H2020-MSCA-RISE-2015"
categories: [Media & Social Media Monitoring]
---

ENCASE - EnhaNcing seCurity and privacy in the Social wEb: a user centered approach for the protection of minors
